[CONTRIBUTION EVENT]

- Description: Large Spike Index (/large_spikes) — roadmap + Sophia handoff
  
  Pull requests (GitHub evidence):

  Details:
  Designed and authored the execution roadmap for the Large Spike Index (/large_spikes) — the bullish/momentum mirror of the sell-off index (surfaces breakout/leadership names like MU, INTU for continuation trades, the 'other half' of /large_dips). Traced the full dip lifecycle in sentiment_importer, discovered the existing crypto spike stack + first_spike column, and scoped a §5a one-PR-per-turn plan (migration + mark_large_spikes predicate, breadth index refresher, view + sector lens, backfill + UAT) with a §5d-complete pre-flight. Merged the roadmap (sentiment_importer #1098), registered the handoff in HANDOFF_MANIFEST.md + SOPHIA_HANDOFFS.md (#639, #640), and parked Sophia GO-ready in Telegram thread 8297.
- Contributor(s): Claude Anthropic
